title: Crispy Dutch Pistachio Stir Fry
description: A crunchy and savory stir fry made with crispy fried onions, flavorful Dutch spices, and the nuttiness of pistachios.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and stir-fry until the onion is translucent.
Add the bell pepper and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the fermented soy sauce and Dutch spice blend. Stir to combine.
Add the pistachios and crispy fried onions. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until the ingredients are well combined and the pistachios are lightly toasted.
